content_markdown: Which option is **not** a possible solution to reduce the enhanced greenhouse effect?

diagram_metadata.description: No diagram present in the image.

options.label: B
options.text: Replace the use of coal and oil with natural gas

options.label: C
options.text: Use combined heating and power (CHP) systems

vibe_explanation: Nuclear power plants do not emit greenhouse gases during operation. Decommissioning them would likely lead to an increase in fossil fuel usage to meet energy demands, thereby increasing the enhanced greenhouse effect rather than reducing it. Options B, C, and D all represent methods to improve efficiency or switch to lower-carbon alternatives.
